channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Privet Hedge Needs Heavy Pruning, 15th March
item.description:
The hedge on the Betts Park side of the boundary with Seymour Terrace needs cutting back to match the height of the metal railing. (There is a special covenant in the park deeds that state this partition must not exceed 4ft). Cutting will reduce it roughly by half and allow more light to the PROW in the park, improving security, and open Seymour Terrace hopefully reducing refuse and fly-tipping.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Seymour Terrace, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road markings completely worm away, 15th March
item.description:
Road markings including the turn right box and cheverons have completely worn away, many near misses as drivers are using what's barely visably left of the turning box but have oncoming traffic driving right through the box, witnessed a few very close calls as drivers heading west aren't seeing the box that drivers are tuning into to turn into Tesco
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Edgington Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blue graffiti, 15th March
item.description:
Blue graffiti on gray electrical box next to Vicarage grove street sign

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Camberwell Church Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping and dumped gas canisters, 15th March
item.description:
Hello - please can the dumped waste and gas/chemical canisters be removed swiftly. Not only are they an eyesore, but potentially a safety risk.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Westbourne Park, 96 Great Western Rd, Graffiti is on Door of Fmr Granada School of Motoring, 15th March
item.description:
Westbourne Park, 96 Great Western Rd, Graffiti is on Door of Fmr Granada School of Motoring

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Great Western Road, Kensal Town, City of Westminster

item.title: Massive dip in the road, 15th March
item.description:
Big dip in the middle of the road at the junction of Croxted Road, South Croxted Road and Park Hall Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 78, Park Hall Road, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two street lights not working, 15th March
item.description:
Hello - neighbours have confirmed to me that the first two street lights on Nunhead Crescent, when approaching from Peckham Rye, do not work. Please can they be fixed swiftly, as residents have reported not feeling safe in the darkness this has caused.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nunhead Crescent, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light - wonky lantern, 15th March
item.description:
P7 55 LED lantern angled down.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 281, Pickhurst Lane, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Please remove graffiti, 15th March
item.description:
The white building has been graffitied again - please can this be cleaned swiftly.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 82, Rye Lane, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti along Sternall Lane, 15th March
item.description:
Please can this graffiti be removed and the wall coated in anti-graffiti paint which we know the council has available for this purpose.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sternhall Lane, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: End of twigg close junction with Frinsted road as you turn in or out of twigg close the surface is bone shaking and I have received 2 punctures in car now at low speed first gear, 15th March
item.description:
The road is damaged holes gapes around drain needs resurfacing the whole close road is pretty lumpy but the top is very bad now and needs doing asap before any accidents happen

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Twigg Close, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on Junction Box, no.215 Kilburn Road, 15th March
item.description:
Graffiti on Junction Box, no.215 Kilburn Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn Lane, North Kensington, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped mattress, 15th March
item.description:
Please can this fly-tipping be removed swiftly.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 69, Scylla Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish left by scum landlord /tenant, 15th March
item.description:
Rubbish left on pavement ive moved to address it comes from 172 Nags Head Rd EN37AR

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nags Head Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Manor Road was resurfaced few weeks ago and the double yellow lines on the corner of Manor Road (out side ECS office) were replaced with single yellow lines, 15th March
item.description:
I reported this under FixMy Street ref.9024350 and forwarded on some emails to Traffic but they forwarded them to "Streets" and someone then closed my Fixmystreet without responding to me which was very unhelpful. The water Company dug up the newly raid road and part of it has not been resurfaced but the area I am talking about, right at the corner is not affected. In 2015 I opened dialogue with "Traffic" regarding the blocking of the road entrance due to parking right up to the corner outside of the CPZ times, meaning double parking without pulling in spaces left cars turning right from Station Road stuck in the main road, blocking traffic. This was sorted out by a double yellow line being added on the corner. Please see email to "streets" Since this has been missing, car have parked up to 3 feet from the corner, making it difficult for pedestrians and causing to tail backs. Please can you look into this matter.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manor Road, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car left for over a week, 15th March
item.description:
This car has been left for over a week in a spot that’s very unusual to park. Not illegal but just odd. It was put there in the night so leads me to wonder if it’s location isn’t known by the car’s owner.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Farnaby Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street sweeping, 15th March
item.description:
The stretch on stretch from the round chapel to Clapton pond

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lower Clapton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illuminated sign - out, 15th March
item.description:
No right turn sign
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rookery Lane, Bromley Common, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress, bedframe and suitcases outside HMO, 15th March
item.description:
Broken bedframe, dirty matress and suitcase dumped outside HMO at 27 Wingmore Rd since before Christmas attracting vermin and unsightly

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Wingmore Road, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping - all sorts of rubbish and appliance, 15th March
item.description:
Flytipping - all sorts of rubbish and appliance. Please could the rubbish be removed. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Middle Park Avenue, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet
